rag_rules: Assume and guarantee statements must be placed in component types, not implementations
Use assign only for implementation-level output bindings or declared auxiliary variables
generic_rules: AGREE contracts must reference only visible identifiers from the AADL model
Guarantee expressions must have valid types and resolved identifiers
Component type contracts may only reference visible features, not implementation-only paths
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annexes are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Constants and equations in AGREE must use valid scalar types: int, real, bool
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope; move to type scope or use assign
Do not reference unresolved identifiers or invalid helper declarations in guarantees
